## Integration

What provider, gateway, CI system, export target, or report consumer should `pangolin-eval` support?

## Use Case

What workflow would this unlock?

## Expected Inputs And Outputs

Describe the config shape, command, report field, schema field, or artifact you would expect.

## Constraints

Mention authentication, privacy, local-only requirements, rate limits, or compatibility concerns.
